# Developer Role

## Overview

Developers are responsible for implementing features, fixing bugs, and maintaining code quality in the AI-Game-Project-1 repository.

## Responsibilities

- Always ask me before pushing any code
- Implement features according to specifications
- Write clean, maintainable code following project conventions
- Create and maintain unit tests for new functionality
- Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback
- Keep dependencies updated and secure
- Document code changes and complex logic
- Address code review feedback promptly

## Getting Started

1. Review the [Copilot Instructions](./copilot-instructions.md) for project setup and conventions
2. Set up the local development environment (MongoDB, .NET SDK, Node.js)
3. Familiarize yourself with the project structure and existing code
4. Check the issue tracker for tasks to work on

## Development Workflow

1. Create a feature branch for your work
2. Implement the feature following project conventions
3. Write tests for your changes
4. Submit a pull request with a clear description
5. Address feedback from reviewers
6. Merge once approved

## Code Quality Standards

- Follow the naming conventions outlined in copilot-instructions.md
- Maintain TypeScript strict mode and proper type annotations
- Write meaningful commit messages
- Keep functions small and focused
- Comment complex logic, not obvious code

## Communication

- Ask questions in discussions or comments if unclear
- Keep the team updated on progress in pull requests
- Report blockers early
